builtInDhikrs.meaning: Glory be to Allah

localizedMeaning.english: Glory be to Allah
localizedMeaning.kurdish: پاکی و بێ کەموکوڕی بۆ خوای گەورە

builtInDhikrs.meaning: All praise is for Allah

localizedMeaning.english: All praise is for Allah
localizedMeaning.kurdish: هەموو ستایش و سوپاس بۆ خوای گەورەیە

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Allah is the Greatest

localizedMeaning.english: Allah is the Greatest
localizedMeaning.kurdish: خوا گەورەترە لە هەموو شتێک

builtInDhikrs.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah

localizedMeaning.english: I seek forgiveness from Allah
localizedMeaning.kurdish: داوای لێخۆشبوون لە خوای گەورە دەکەم

builtInDhikrs.meaning: There is no god but Allah

localizedMeaning.english: There is no god but Allah
localizedMeaning.kurdish: هیچ پەرستراوێکی بەحق نییە جگە لە خوا

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
builtInDhikrs.meaning: Ayat al-Kursi

localizedMeaning.english: Recite Ayat al-Kursi once.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: ئایەتی کورسی یەکجار بخوێنەوە.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Surat al-Ikhlas

localizedMeaning.english: Recite Surat al-Ikhlas.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: سوورەتی ئیخلاص بخوێنەوە.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Surat al-Falaq

localizedMeaning.english: Recite Surat al-Falaq.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: سوورەتی فەلەق بخوێنەوە.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Surat an-Nas

localizedMeaning.english: Recite Surat an-Nas.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: سوورەتی ناس بخوێنەوە.

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
builtInDhikrs.meaning: Allah is sufficient for me; there is no god but Him.

localizedMeaning.english: Allah is sufficient for me; there is no god but Him.
localizedMeaning.arabic: حسبي الله لا إله إلا هو عليه توكلت وهو رب العرش العظيم.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: خوا بۆ من بەسە، هیچ پەرستراوێکی بەحق نییە جگە لەو.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Glory and praise be to Allah.

localizedMeaning.english: Glory and praise be to Allah.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: پاکی و ستایش بۆ خوای گەورە.

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
builtInDhikrs.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah...
builtInDhikrs.meaning: There is no god but Allah alone, without partner.

localizedMeaning.english: There is no god but Allah alone, without partner.
localizedMeaning.arabic: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شيء قدير.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: هیچ پەرستراوێکی بەحق نییە جگە لە خوای یەکتا و بێ هاوبەش.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: We enter the morning and all dominion belongs to Allah.

localizedMeaning.english: We enter the morning and all dominion belongs to Allah.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: بەیانی کرد و هەموو پاشایەتی بۆ خوای گەورەیە.

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
builtInDhikrs.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna...
builtInDhikrs.meaning: O Allah, by You we enter morning and evening.

localizedMeaning.english: O Allah, by You we enter morning and evening.
localizedMeaning.arabic: اللهم بك أصبحنا وبك أمسينا وبك نحيا وبك نموت وإليك النشور.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: خوایە، بە تۆ بەیانی و ئێوارە دەکەین، بە تۆ دەژین و دەمرین.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: We enter the evening and all dominion belongs to Allah.

localizedMeaning.english: We enter the evening and all dominion belongs to Allah.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: ئێوارە کرد و هەموو پاشایەتی بۆ خوای گەورەیە.

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
builtInDhikrs.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna wa bika asbahna...
builtInDhikrs.meaning: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and the morning.

localizedMeaning.english: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and the morning.
localizedMeaning.arabic: اللهم بك أمسينا وبك أصبحنا وبك نحيا وبك نموت وإليك المصير.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: خوایە، بە تۆ ئێوارە و بەیانی دەکەین و بە تۆ دەژین و دەمرین.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

localizedMeaning.english: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: بە ناوی تۆ، خوایە، دەمرم و دەژیم.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Glory be to Allah before sleep.

localizedMeaning.english: Glory be to Allah before sleep.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: تەسبیح پێش خەوتن.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Praise be to Allah before sleep.

localizedMeaning.english: Praise be to Allah before sleep.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: سوپاس بۆ خوا پێش خەوتن.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: Allah is the Greatest before sleep.

localizedMeaning.english: Allah is the Greatest before sleep.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: تکبیر پێش خەوتن.

builtInDhikrs.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ
builtInDhikrs.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Ant...
builtInDhikrs.meaning: The master supplication for seeking forgiveness.

localizedMeaning.english: The master supplication for seeking forgiveness.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: سەییدی ئیستیغفار.

builtInDhikrs.meaning: I seek Allah's forgiveness and repent to Him.

localizedMeaning.english: I seek Allah's forgiveness and repent to Him.
localizedMeaning.kurdish: داوای لێخۆشبوون لە خوا دەکەم و تۆبە بۆی دەکەم.

presetSets.title: After Salah Tasbih
presetSets.subtitle: Move through the well-known post-prayer remembrance set.

localizedSubtitle.english: Move through the well-known post-prayer remembrance set.
localizedSubtitle.arabic: تنقّل في مجموعة الأذكار المعروفة التي تُقال بعد الصلاة.
localizedSubtitle.kurdish: بە نۆرە لە زیکرە ناسراوەکانی دوای نوێژ بڕۆ.

presetSets.title: Morning Adhkar
presetSets.subtitle: Start the day with the commonly recited morning remembrance collection.

localizedSubtitle.english: Start the day with the commonly recited morning remembrance collection.
localizedSubtitle.arabic: ابدأ يومك بمجموعة أذكار الصباح المشهورة.
localizedSubtitle.kurdish: ڕۆژەکەت بە کۆمەڵە زیکری ناسراوی بەیانی دەست پێبکە.

presetSets.title: Evening Adhkar
presetSets.subtitle: Close the day with the most common evening remembrance flow.

localizedSubtitle.english: Close the day with the most common evening remembrance flow.
localizedSubtitle.arabic: اختم يومك بأشهر مسار لأذكار المساء.
localizedSubtitle.kurdish: ڕۆژەکەت بە ناسراوترین زنجیرەی زیکری ئێوارە کۆتایی پێبهێنە.

presetSets.title: Sleep Adhkar
presetSets.subtitle: Prepare for sleep with the well-known nightly adhkar.

localizedSubtitle.english: Prepare for sleep with the well-known nightly adhkar.
localizedSubtitle.arabic: استعد للنوم بالأذكار المشهورة التي تُقال ليلاً.
localizedSubtitle.kurdish: خۆت بۆ خەوتن ئامادە بکە بە زیکرە ناسراوەکانی شەو.

presetSets.title: Istighfar Collection
presetSets.subtitle: A dedicated flow for repentance and seeking forgiveness.

localizedSubtitle.english: A dedicated flow for repentance and seeking forgiveness.
localizedSubtitle.kurdish: زنجیرەیەکی تایبەت بۆ تۆبە و داوای لێخۆشبوون.
